insight: Localized time words ("10 minutes", "10 минут") come from the Foundation lang keys case-second, case-minute, case-hour, case-day, each accepting 2 or 3 comma-separated plural forms (e.g. "minútu, minúty, minút"), so languages with complex plural cases are supported by overriding these keys in the locale file. Raw duration placeholders like {duration} in mute messages echo the admin's input (10m); the word form is produced by these case keys.
